nasb.text: And I saw the seven angels who stand before God, and seven trumpets were given to them.

esv.text: Then I saw the seven angels who stand before God, and seven trumpets were given to them.

cnv.text: 我看見站在　神面前的七位天使，有七枝號筒賜給了他們。

ccb.text: 然后，我看见站在上帝面前的七位天使领受了七支号角。

csbs.text: 接着，我看见站在神面前的七位天使，被赐予了七支号角。
